integration_constraints: Gemini API rate limit: 15 RPM for free tier.
migration_risks: Upgrading to AJV Draft 2020-12 might break older schemas.
environment_assumptions: Windows OS with Node.js v20+ installed.
compliance_requirements: No user PII should be sent to the public LLM API.
known_unknowns: Will the LLM output conform perfectly to strict JSON 100% of the time without infinite retries?
technical_risks: LLM context window truncation during large code reviews
Strict JSON schema failures causing infinite retry loops
